7:
“You have done well,” Fray tells you. Far better than <If(PlayerParameter(4))>she<Else/>he</If> could have hoped. But the risks will only increase as you walk further along the path. “Trust in me,” <If(PlayerParameter(4))>she<Else/>he</If> asks, and you want to. You know that you need to...and that, when the time is right, <If(PlayerParameter(4))>she<Else/>he</If> will be waiting for you where you first met.

※The next dark knight quest will be available from Fray upon reaching level 35.
